seoTitle: Linco News & Updates | Product Releases & Events | LiTong Distributor
seoDescription: Latest news from Linco including new motor control MCU releases, automotive product updates, and industry events. Stay informed about motor control solutions.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest Linco product announcements?
faqs.answer: Latest Linco product announcements are available through: (1) This news page - regularly updated with new releases; (2) LiTong newsletter - subscribe for email updates; (3) Product pages - show latest releases; (4) Technical support - contact FAE for roadmap information. As an authorized distributor, LiTong receives advance notice of new products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's newsletter and check this page regularly for updates.

faqs.question: How do I get notified about Linco events and webinars?
faqs.answer: Stay informed about Linco events through: (1) LiTong events page - upcoming webinars and seminars; (2) Email notifications - subscribe to event alerts; (3) Technical seminars - regional training on motor control and Linco MCUs; (4) Online webinars - virtual training sessions. LiTong hosts technical seminars featuring Linco motor control solutions and hands-on workshops.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's event notifications for invitations to technical seminars.

articles.title: Linco Launches LKS08 Series with Integrated 6N Gate Driver
articles.summary: New LKS08 series motor control MCUs integrate 6N gate driver, reducing BOM cost and PCB size for motor drive applications.
content: Linco has announced the release of its LKS08 series motor control MCUs featuring integrated 6N gate drivers.
- Integrated 6N gate driver with 1.2A/1.5A drive capability
- Reduced BOM cost - eliminates external gate driver IC
- Smaller PCB size - integration saves board space
- Simplified design - fewer components and connections
- High drive capability - supports motors up to 500W
Applications include home appliances, power tools, and industrial drives.

articles.title: Linco Expands Automotive MCU Portfolio with LKS32AT086
articles.summary: New LKS32AT086 automotive MCU features integrated 6N gate driver and AEC-Q100 Grade 1 certification for demanding automotive applications.
content: Linco has launched the LKS32AT086, a premium automotive motor control MCU with integrated 6N gate driver.

articles.title: Linco Releases Enhanced FOC Algorithm Library v2.0
articles.summary: New FOC library v2.0 adds MTPA, field weakening, and vibration suppression for improved motor control performance.
content: Linco has released version 2.0 of its Field Oriented Control (FOC) algorithm library with significant enhancements.
- Field weakening for extended speed range
- Speed range extended to 150% base speed
Compatible with LKS05, LKS07, and LKS08 series.
Available now through LiTong support portal.

articles.title: LiTong Partners with Linco as Authorized Distributor
articles.summary: LiTong adds Linco motor control MCUs to product portfolio, providing local inventory and technical support for motor control applications.
content: LiTong is pleased to announce a distribution partnership with Linco (Linko Semiconductor), adding motor control MCUs, automotive chips, and gate drivers to our product portfolio.
As an authorized Linco distributor, LiTong provides:
- Full product line: LKS03, LKS05, LKS07, LKS08, LKS32AT series
- Comprehensive technical support from motor control FAEs
- Application engineering and design review services
This partnership enhances LiTong's motor control solutions offering and provides customers with cost-effective alternatives to international MCU brands.

articles.title: Linco Introduces LKS45 Series for Dual Motor Control
articles.summary: New LKS45 series supports simultaneous control of two motors with PFC, targeting high-end appliances and industrial applications.
content: Linco has announced the LKS45 series dual motor control MCUs for demanding multi-motor applications.
